evals.prompt:
I ran parse-data-table on my catalog and got this output. Can you tell me which AstroDB table and field each column belongs to?

| Column | Description | Units | Type |
|--------|-------------|-------|------|
| source_id | Primary source identifier | — | str |
| alt_name | Alternative catalog name | — | str |
| ra | Right ascension (J2000) | deg | float64 |
| dec | Declination (J2000) | deg | float64 |
| plx | Parallax | mas | float64 |
| e_plx | Parallax uncertainty | mas | float64 |
| pmRA | Proper motion in RA*cos(dec) | mas/yr | float64 |
| e_pmRA | Uncertainty in pmRA | mas/yr | float64 |
| pmDE | Proper motion in declination | mas/yr | float64 |
| e_pmDE | Uncertainty in pmDE | mas/yr | float64 |
| RV | Heliocentric radial velocity | km/s | float64 |
| e_RV | RV uncertainty | km/s | float64 |
| SpT | Spectral type | — | str |
| assoc | Moving group or association membership | — | str |
| ref | Reference bibcode | — | str |
evals.expected_output: A markdown table mapping each column to the correct AstroDB table and field with confidence levels and ingestion notes.

assertions.text: All 15 input columns appear in the output table and each has a non-empty DB Table and DB Field assignment (no blanks or N/A for well-known columns)
Column 'plx' is mapped to Parallaxes table and parallax_mas field
Column 'e_plx' is mapped to Parallaxes table and parallax_error field
Column 'pmRA' is mapped to ProperMotions table and pm_ra field
Column 'pmDE' is mapped to ProperMotions table and pm_dec field
Column 'RV' is mapped to RadialVelocities table and rv_kms field
Column 'SpT' is mapped to SourceTypes table and source_type field
Column 'assoc' is mapped to Associations table
Column 'source_id' is mapped to Sources table and source field
Column 'alt_name' is mapped to Names table and other_name field
The ingestion notes section mentions that each data table row requires a source foreign key (source identifier is required in each data table)

evals.prompt:
Here's the column table from parse-data-table for a multi-band photometry catalog. Please map these to the right AstroDB fields:

| Column | Description | Units | Type |
|--------|-------------|-------|------|
| name | Object designation (2MASS or WISE) | — | str |
| Jmag | 2MASS J-band magnitude | mag | float64 |
| eJmag | J-band magnitude uncertainty | mag | float64 |
| Hmag | 2MASS H-band magnitude | mag | float64 |
| eHmag | H-band uncertainty | mag | float64 |
| Kmag | 2MASS Ks-band magnitude | mag | float64 |
| eKmag | Ks-band uncertainty | mag | float64 |
| W1mag | WISE W1 magnitude | mag | float64 |
| eW1mag | W1 uncertainty | mag | float64 |
| W2mag | WISE W2 magnitude | mag | float64 |
| eW2mag | W2 uncertainty | mag | float64 |
| Teff | Effective temperature from SED fit | K | float64 |
| e_Teff | Teff uncertainty | K | float64 |
| logL | Log luminosity from SED fit | Lsun | float64 |
| e_logL | logL uncertainty | Lsun | float64 |
evals.expected_output: Band magnitude columns map to Photometry.magnitude, errors to Photometry.magnitude_error, with multi-row ingestion note. Teff and logL map to ModeledParameters.

assertions.text: Column 'name' is mapped to Sources table and source field
Column 'Jmag' is mapped to Photometry table and magnitude field
Column 'eJmag' is mapped to Photometry table and magnitude_error field
Column 'W1mag' is mapped to Photometry table and magnitude field
Column 'Teff' is mapped to ModeledParameters table
Column 'logL' is mapped to ModeledParameters table
The ingestion notes mention that each photometry band becomes a separate row in the Photometry table (one row per band per source, not one column per band)

evals.prompt:
I have a catalog of nearby brown dwarfs with columns from parse-data-table below. I want to ingest this into my AstroDB database. What table/field does each column map to?

| Column | Description | Units | Type |
|--------|-------------|-------|------|
| designation | Source name | — | str |
| RA_ICRS | Right ascension ICRS | deg | float64 |
| DE_ICRS | Declination ICRS | deg | float64 |
| dist_pc | Distance | pc | float64 |
| e_dist | Distance uncertainty | pc | float64 |
| vsini | Projected rotational velocity | km/s | float64 |
| e_vsini | vsini uncertainty | km/s | float64 |
| Prot | Rotation period | d | float64 |
| e_Prot | Period uncertainty | d | float64 |
| sep_arcsec | Projected separation from companion | arcsec | float64 |
| companion_name | Name of companion object | — | str |
| Gmag | Gaia G magnitude | mag | float64 |
| BPmag | Gaia BP magnitude | mag | float64 |
| RPmag | Gaia RP magnitude | mag | float64 |
| notes | Free-form notes | — | str |
evals.expected_output: Handles tricky unit conversions (dist→parallax, days→hours), companion columns, Gaia photometry, and notes field.

assertions.text: Column 'designation' is mapped to Sources table and source field
Column 'dist_pc' is flagged as needing conversion — either note about converting to parallax_mas (1000/dist_pc) for Parallaxes table, or suggesting ModeledParameters as alternative
Column 'Prot' is mapped to RotationalParameters table and period_hr field
There is a note about unit conversion for Prot from days to hours
Column 'vsini' is mapped to RotationalParameters table and v_sin_i_kms field
Column 'sep_arcsec' is mapped to CompanionRelationships table and projected_separation_arcsec field
Column 'Gmag' is mapped to Photometry table and magnitude field
Column 'notes' is mapped to a comments field in some table
